items.title: Study the pattern
items.body:
Workbook lesson 6: Conversation 6. Read the sentences, listen, and repeat.

Examples:
• Do you speak Portuguese at home?
• Do you work in the morning?
• 2. Do you like to sleep in the morning? In the afternoon / in the evening.
• 8. Do you eat bread and cheese at school? cheese ham / bread ham.

items.text: Do you speak Portuguese at home?

items.prompt: No, I don’t speak Portuguese. I speak English.
options: home? at Portuguese speak you Do
Do you speak Portuguese at home?
Do you speak Portuguese at home? 2.
Do you speak Portuguese at home? 3.

items.text: Do you work in the morning?

items.prompt: No, I don’t work in the morning. I work at night.
options: morning? the in work you Do
Do you work in the morning? 2.
Do you work in the morning? 3.
Do you work in the morning?

items.text: 2. Do you like to sleep in the morning? In the afternoon / in the evening.

items.prompt: 3. Do you drink coffee or milk for breakfast? / juice – coffee / juice milk.
options: 2. Do you like to sleep in the morning? In the afternoon / in the evening 3.
2. Do you like to sleep in the morning? In the afternoon / in the evening.
